workspace.name: Workspace Name
workspace.delete_workspace_warning: Once you delete a workspace, there is no going back. Be certain.
workspace.delete_confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? All data including content, campaigns, and team members will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the workspace?

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.communication_description: Connect your workspace to external communication platforms
integrations.slack_description: Receive notifications in your Slack channels
integrations.discord_description: Send updates to your Discord server
integrations.webhook_security_description: Configure security settings for incoming webhooks
integrations.secret_placeholder: Generate a secret for webhook verification
integrations.secret_description: This secret will be used to verify incoming webhook requests
integrations.owner_exclusive_description: Only workspace owners can manage integrations.

roles_management.title: Roles & Permissions
roles_management.description: Summary of available roles and their associated permissions in Intellipost.
roles_management.create_role_subtitle: Define a new role and its permissions for the workspace.
roles_management.role_description_placeholder: Describe the responsibilities of this role...

workspace.subtitle: Manage and switch between your workspaces

create_card.subtitle: Collaborate with a new team or project

modal.subtitle: Set up a new space for your team to collaborate
modal.footer_note: You can customize settings and invite members after creating the workspace

workspace.configure_basic_info: Configure your workspace's basic information and visibility
workspace.public_description: Visible to anyone with the link
workspace.public_invites_description: Allow anyone to join with invitation link
workspace.id_description: Use this ID for API integrations and support requests
workspace.activity_will_appear: Notifications will appear here once sent
workspace.owner_admin_required: You need owner or admin permissions to modify role settings

quick_actions.title: Quick Actions
quick_actions.invite_members_description: Add new members to the team

timezone.title: Workspace Timezone
timezone.description: All dates and times in this workspace will be displayed in this timezone. This affects scheduled posts, analytics, and calendar events.
timezone.using_default: Using default UTC timezone. Set a workspace timezone below.
timezone.permission_required: Only workspace owners and administrators can change the timezone.

white_label.title: Custom Branding (White-label)
white_label.description: Personalize the platform with your own logo and corporate colors.
white_label.logo_help: Recommended: PNG or SVG with transparent background.
white_label.color_help: This color will be used for buttons, links, and reports.
white_label.impact_notice: Changes are applied immediately for all users in this workspace.

api.title: API Access Tokens
api.description: Generate tokens to authenticate requests to the Intellipost API.
api.token_warning: Copy this token now. For security reasons, it will not be shown again.
api.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this token? It will stop working immediately.
api.security_help: API tokens grant full access to this workspace. Never share them or commit them to public repositories.

documentation.title: API Documentation
documentation.description: Download the complete Enterprise API reference to integrate Intellipost into your systems.
documentation.enterprise_guide_description: Markdown reference with all endpoints, request/response examples, and business logic.
documentation.openapi_description: JSON schema directly importable into Postman, Insomnia, or any API client.
documentation.pdf_conversion_help: To convert Markdown to PDF: open the file in VS Code → install the "Markdown PDF" extension → right-click → Export (pdf).

usage_info.title: How to use your API Token?
usage_info.description: Send the token in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. Dashboard tokens do not expire automatically — they last until you manually revoke them.
usage_info.refresh_token_help: Need short-lived tokens with automatic refresh? Use the programmatic endpoint POST /api/auth/token — see downloadable documentation.

api.saved_token: I saved it, close this message
api.revoke_irreversible: This action is irreversible. Any system or application using this token will immediately lose access.

scopes.label: Token Permissions
scopes.toggle_hint_full: Full access — click to restrict by section

dedicated_support.title: Dedicated Support Manager
dedicated_support.description: As an Enterprise customer, you have a dedicated account manager available via WhatsApp or email for priority assistance.

sla.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
sla.description: Your workspace is covered by our 99.9% uptime guarantee. We provide monthly availability reports upon request.

integrations.title: Custom Integrations
integrations.description: Need to connect Intellipost with your own CRM or ERP? Our team can build custom integrations tailored to your workflow.
